docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CICERO, CHRIS AS TO DEFENDANT SALINAS, RAFAEL CURRAN, HEATHER GUTIERREZ, ALEJANDRO DOES 1-100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-01-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-29-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-16-2006
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE PLEASE DISMISS DEF. HEATHER CURRAN AND RAFAEL SALINAS ONLY. AS TO DEFENDANT SALINAS, RAFAEL CURRAN, HEATHER

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-16-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) ALEJANDRO GUTIERREZ. THE DEC-01-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-16-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
